generic_rules: Focus repairs on the scope of the validator diagnostic.
Prioritize fixing unresolved references or invalid expressions over architectural changes.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts reside within `annex agree { ... };` blocks.
Use `eq` to define helper expressions and `const` for constants.
anti_patterns: Avoid adding architecture to resolve AGREE errors; fix the contract instead.
Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type annexes.
